subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God that thou hast undertaken a pilgrimage, set thy face toward the Most Exalted Station, and attained unto that which is recorded in the Sacred Books [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لله الحمد هجرت نمودی و قصد مقام اعلی کردی و فائز شدی بانچه در کتب الهی مذکور
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @spiritual transformation, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @presence of; reunion with God, @firmness in the Covenant
